updates.title: Tournament Hub Live
updates.message: The Spring 2026 Tournament Hub is now available in the members area with links to registration forms, carpool sign-ups, and more for each tournament.

updates.title: Battle of the Hudson — March 8th
updates.message: Schedule and pools are posted! 16 teams across 4 pools at Red Hook, Brooklyn. AM session (Boys Varsity/B) and PM session (Boys B/Girls). Check the tournament page for full details.

updates.title: YULA — March 21-22
updates.message: YULA tournament in Arlington, VA. Hotel and registration/carpool forms coming soon — check the Tournament Hub.

updates.title: Spring 2026 Season Calendar Updated
updates.message: Calendar synced with latest practices and tournament dates through May. View the team calendar for the full schedule.
